name: signalk-path-outage-monitor
description: Monitors multiple Signal K paths and logs outages when data stops arriving.
author: Michael Pail <mike@onanewtack.com>

signalk-node-server-plugin.name: Path Outage Monitor
signalk-node-server-plugin.description: Monitors up to 10 Signal K paths; if the time between deltas exceeds a per-path timeout, logs outage start and end with duration.
signalk-node-server-plugin.author: Michael Pail
